text: No internet connection issue took a minimum of 5 hours and a maximum of 11 hours to resolve.

When calling customer care, complaints are registered and tickets are raised, but issues are not resolved; the only response is that it will be resolved in 24 hours, with nobody visiting to actually fix it.
WiFi had problems for almost a month out of two months of service; no internet access during online classes, and the company refused a refund or fix.
Internet service was down for 3 days; customer care only repeated that service would be restored within 24 hours.
